title: phalaris ammophila
intro: Phalaris ammophila, also known as Coast Brome or Sand Brome, is a type of perennial grass native to coastal regions of Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phalaris ammophila are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
